description: Shadow expert: metric mismatch, hub confirmed, question sprint, backlog, role adjust.

examples.context: Structured support floor. One tech red on availability, green on resolution time and quality. Peers line up at cube.
examples.resolution: Reframed as SME hub. Question sprint started. No discipline.

examples.context: One week capture: same VPN error, same form ID, same approval loop
examples.resolution: Three backlog items: FAQ, tool rubric, training slice. Expert credited.

examples.context: Leadership approves two daily office-hour blocks off phone queue
examples.resolution: Availability metric exempt during blocks. Hub formalized.

examples.context: Estimator bad on quote turnaround metric, peers ask prepress fixes all day
examples.resolution: Themes became template pack candidates for repeat client proofs.

examples.context: Route tech low on stops-per-hour, high on machine diagnostics helps
examples.resolution: Half-day telemetry SME role. Route split adjusted.

examples.context: Low availability, no peer queue, long breaks observed
examples.resolution: Not shadow expert. Standard coaching path.

examples.context: Expert bored on phone work but loves helping
examples.resolution: Also evaluate mf-tpl-056 for seat fit after hub formalized.

examples.context: Repeat questions from sprint match Materials Factory gap list
examples.resolution: Internal: new mf-tpl candidate from theme rank #1.
